all.en: Two months ago, I joined a local running club to prepare for my first full marathon.
all.zh: 兩個月前，我加入了一個在地的跑步社團，為我的第一場全程馬拉松做準備。

all.en: The club meets every Tuesday evening and Saturday morning at the riverside park.
all.zh: 這個社團每週二晚上和週六早上在河濱公園集合。

all.en: Our head coach is a retired athlete who has completed over thirty marathons worldwide.
all.zh: 我們的總教練是一位退休的運動員，已在世界各地完成了三十多場馬拉松。

all.en: During my first session, I could barely keep up with the beginner pace group.
all.zh: 在我的第一次練跑時，我幾乎無法跟上初學者配速團體的腳步。

all.en: My legs felt like heavy stones, and my breathing was loud and uneven.
all.zh: 我的雙腿沉重得像石頭，呼吸又大聲又不規律。

all.en: The coach reminded me that endurance is built slowly through weeks of consistent effort.
all.zh: 教練提醒我，耐力是透過數週的持續努力慢慢建立起來的。

all.en: Gradually, I started to enjoy the long runs through quiet streets at sunrise.
all.zh: 漸漸地，我開始享受日出時分穿越寧靜街道的長跑。

all.en: My fellow runners shared tips on nutrition, proper shoes and recovery techniques.
all.zh: 跑友們分享了關於營養、合適鞋款和恢復技巧的建議。

all.en: Last weekend, I successfully completed a twenty-kilometer training run without stopping.
all.zh: 上個週末，我成功完成了二十公里的訓練跑，中途沒有停下來。

all.en: My resting heart rate has dropped significantly, and my sleep quality has greatly improved.
all.zh: 我的靜止心率明顯下降，睡眠品質也大幅提升。

all.en: The official marathon takes place in November, and I feel more confident every week.
all.zh: 正式的馬拉松比賽將在十一月舉行，我每週都感覺更有自信。

all.en: Joining this club has changed my view on what my body is truly capable of.
all.zh: 加入這個社團改變了我對自己身體真正能力的看法。

all.en: As race day approached, our club organized a final group run of thirty kilometers.
all.zh: 隨著比賽日逼近，我們社團組織了一次三十公里的最後集體練跑。

all.en: The coach reminded us to taper our training during the last two weeks before the marathon.
all.zh: 教練提醒我們在馬拉松賽前最後兩週要減量訓練。

all.en: I prepared my race outfit, energy gels and bib number the night before the event.
all.zh: 我在比賽前一晚準備好了參賽裝、能量膠和號碼布。

all.en: On the morning of the marathon, thousands of runners gathered at the cold starting line.
all.zh: 馬拉松當天早晨，數千名跑者聚集在寒冷的起跑線前。

all.en: My teammates and I lined up together and wished each other strong finishes.
all.zh: 我和我的隊友們一起排成一列，互祝彼此能順利完賽。

all.en: The first twenty kilometers felt smooth, but my legs grew heavy around the thirtieth kilometer.
all.zh: 前二十公里感覺很順暢，但到了三十公里左右，我的雙腿就開始沉重起來。

all.en: Volunteers along the course handed out water, bananas and warm words of encouragement.
all.zh: 沿途的志工發放了水、香蕉和溫暖的鼓勵話語。

all.en: My coach was waiting near the finish line, holding a colorful sign with my name.
all.zh: 我的教練在終點線附近等候，手裡拿著一張寫有我名字的彩色標語。

all.en: I crossed the line in four hours and twelve minutes, exhausted but completely overjoyed.
all.zh: 我以四小時十二分鐘的成績越過終點，雖然筋疲力盡卻欣喜若狂。

all.en: That medal now hangs above my desk as a daily reminder of my own strength.
all.zh: 那面獎牌如今掛在我的書桌上方，每天提醒著我自身的力量。

all.en: In the weeks after the marathon, my legs slowly recovered through gentle walks and warm baths.
all.zh: 馬拉松後的幾週裡，我的雙腿透過輕鬆散步和溫水浴慢慢恢復了。

all.en: My coach suggested I rest fully for one month before considering any new training goals.
all.zh: 教練建議我先完全休息一個月，再考慮任何新的訓練目標。

all.en: During that break, I journaled about every emotion I had experienced throughout the entire training journey.
all.zh: 在那段休息期間，我在日記裡寫下了整段訓練旅程中所經歷的每一種情緒。

all.en: Writing helped me understand why running had transformed both my body and my inner mindset.
all.zh: 書寫幫助我理解了為什麼跑步同時改變了我的身體和內在的心態。

all.en: A younger club member quietly approached me, asking how she could prepare for her first marathon.
all.zh: 一位較年輕的社團成員悄悄走來，詢問我她該如何準備她的第一場馬拉松。

all.en: I happily shared my notes, recommended shoes and the specific recovery techniques that worked for me.
all.zh: 我開心地分享了我的筆記、推薦鞋款，以及對我有效的特定恢復技巧。

all.en: Soon, three other newcomers asked me to mentor them informally during their evening training sessions.
all.zh: 很快地，另外三位新成員請求我在他們的晚間訓練時段非正式地指導他們。

all.en: My coach noticed and officially invited me to become an assistant pacer for the beginner group.
all.zh: 教練注意到了，並正式邀請我成為初學者組別的助理配速員。

all.en: Helping others run faster and stronger gave me a deeper purpose beyond personal race times.
all.zh: 幫助他人跑得更快更強，給了我超越個人比賽成績的更深層意義。

all.en: Next year, I plan to run an international marathon and bring two trainees along for support.
all.zh: 明年，我計畫參加一場國際馬拉松，並帶兩位學員一起去互相支持。
